sound_layers.description: Distant raptor vocalisations — short clicks and chirps from treeline
Low wind through dense prehistoric fern canopy
Sharp raptor bark — plays when player enters raptor aggro radius

music_layer.description: Low percussion — bone drums and hollow wood, irregular rhythm building tension

sound_layers.description: Deep low-frequency ground rumble from distant herd movement
Sauropod low-frequency contact calls — slow, resonant, spaced 10-20s apart
Open grassland wind — stronger than jungle, with grass rustle

music_layer.description: Sparse, wide-interval melodic theme — awe and scale. Long sustained tones.

sound_layers.description: Massive ground tremor — hundreds of tonnes of herbivore in motion
Individual heavy footfall impacts layered over rumble
Distressed herbivore vocalisations — fear response, high urgency

music_layer.description: Driving percussion — maximum urgency, no melody, pure rhythm escalation

quest_stingers.description: Short 2-bar motif — low bone drum hit + rising flute fragment. Signals new objective.
Single resonant stone tap + short breath exhale. Subtle satisfaction cue.
3-bar resolution phrase — bone drum + flute + stone harmony. Earned, not celebratory.
Low descending drone — single note fall into silence. Gravity, not melodrama.

voice_lines_pending_tts.speaker: TribalElder_Kara
voice_lines_pending_tts.text: Stay low. The great lizard hunts at dusk. I have seen it take down a mammoth in three steps. We move only when the wind is right.

voice_lines_pending_tts.speaker: TribalElder_Kara
voice_lines_pending_tts.text: Three raptors. Moving fast. They circle before they strike — always from the flanks. Get to the rocks before they close the gap.

voice_lines_pending_tts.speaker: Scout_Davan
voice_lines_pending_tts.text: Look at them. Hundreds. Moving south like they do every dry season. If we track them right, we eat for a month.

voice_lines_pending_tts.speaker: Scout_Davan
voice_lines_pending_tts.text: They crossed the river here. See the tracks? Fresh — maybe two hours. Keep moving.

notes: All ambient zones use AmbientSound actors as spatial anchors — replace with MetaSound Sources when assets available
Quest stingers should be implemented as non-spatialized 2D MetaSound Sources triggered via Blueprint event dispatchers
Music layers use adaptive intensity curves — implement via MetaSound parameter modulation driven by player proximity and quest state
Voice lines pending ElevenLabs TTS quota reset — IDs defined, ready for import when audio files available
Instrument palette: bone_drum, bone_flute, hollow_wood_knock, resonant_stone_tap, breath_drone — all procedural or foley-sourced, no orchestral instruments
